name: Furry Crash Landing
description:
Long story short, you were misunderstood on earth. So, they exiled you from the planet. You land on a planet called “Anthrosia” by the inhabitants, who are all anthropomorphic animals (furries). You can choose your power(s), and the reason why you were exiled/misunderstood, just include them in parentheses in your first messages.

I’d recommend setting up camp, or you can go looking for life. It’s up to you.

Human sona recommended—any gender.

Let me know if you have and recommendations, or tips and tricks on how to make the bot better! Have fun!
creator: Robinhood30210
